page: Microsoft Azure DC48s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the DCSv3 server family. Powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz, this server provides 48 physical cores and 48 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. It features 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding an 8.0 GB per core ratio. The architecture is x86_64, supported by a Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong multi-core processing and memory subsystem performance. The server achieved a strong rating in stress-ng multi-core CPU tests and Geekbench multi-core scores. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with read-only large block bandwidth reaching 331.62 GB/sec and write large block bandwidth at 136.03 GB/sec, both rated as strong. Cryptographic and vector operations are accelerated by hardware flags including AVX-512 and AES. Image processing performance is particularly notable, achieving a top-tier rating in Geekbench image processing tests.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the DC48s_v3 offers high resource density for memory-bound applications, representing a qualitatively cost-efficient profile for workloads requiring substantial RAM without the overhead of GPU hardware. However, the lack of local storage requires external storage provisioning, and the absence of a GPU limits its utility for heavy LLM text generation, as evidenced by a weak rating in 70B model text generation. This server is highly suited for database operations, static web serving, memory-cached applications like Redis, and multi-threaded software compilation.
description: Microsoft Azure DC48s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the DCSv3 family, featuring 48 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, it delivers 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The server lacks local storage and GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks show strong multi-core CPU performance, high memory bandwidth, and top-tier image processing capabilities. It excels in database operations, static web serving, and Redis deployments, though it exhibits weak performance in large-scale LLM text generation. This configuration provides a qualitatively cost-efficient option for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC48s_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and no local storage, delivering strong multi-core and database performance under Hyper-V.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC48s_v3 features 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and strong multi-core performance for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 48-core x86_64 virtual machine with 384 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads and high-throughput web serving.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8370C processor at 2.8 GHz
384.0 GB of system memory providing an 8.0 GB per core ratio
Strong multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database benchmark performance
No bundled local storage or GPU, requiring external storage attachment
Best suited for database operations, Redis caching, and static web serving
